title: GFP pull down assay
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"fbv4c","text":"Materials","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6q218","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7lg0g","text":"GFP-Trap agarose beads (Chromotek) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1vsaa","text":"dH2O","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":2,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bck0v","text":"Protein Loading dye","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9jru6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"64d9b","text":" Bead assay buffer ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7ht4h","text":"      Tris-HCl pH 7.4  25 mM    NaCl  150 mM    DTT  1 mM  ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":59}],"data":{}},{"key":"86gbq","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"","0_1":"","1_0":"","1_1":"","2_0":"","2_1":""},"colTitles":["",""],"colWidths":["112","88"],"data":[["Tris-HCl pH 7.4","25 mM"],["NaCl","150 mM"],["DTT","1 mM"]],"guid":"58CB6FDD14DF11EE8DBF0A58A9FEAC02","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["Tris-HCl pH 7.4","25 mM"],["NaCl","150 mM"],["DTT","1 mM"]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23]}}}}
steps: Mix GFP-tagged TBK1 with 20 µL of equilibrated GFP-Trap agarose beads (Chromotek) at a final concentration of 1 micromolar (µM) . Make sure to wash beads 2x in dH2O before washing with bead assay buffer to equilibrate the beads adding the protein to the beads.
To this end, wash 20 µL of beads twice with dH 2 O and equilibrate with bead assay buffer.
Resuspend the beads in 40 µL bead assay buffer, to this add GFP-TBK1 at a final concentration of 5 micromolar (µM) .
Incubate the beads with GFP-TBK1 for 01:00:00 at 4 °C at a horizontal tube roller.
Wash the beads three times to remove unbound GFP-tagged bait protein.
Prepare protein master mixes with prey protein in bead assay buffer at the following concentrations: mCherry-OPTN (1 µM), mCherry-NDP52 (1 µM), GST-NAP1 (1-10 µM).
Add the protein master mixes to the beads and incubate for 01:00:00 at 4 °C at a horizontal tube roller.
Wash the beads three times to remove unbound proteins, remove any supernatant from the beads and resuspend the beads in 60 µL of 1x Protein Loading dye, and heat-inactivate at 95 °C for 00:05:00 .
Analyze the samples by SDS-PAGE and Coomassie staining as described above.
creator: Elias Adriaenssens
